comments.body:
## [Codecov](https://app.codecov.io/gh/h5py/h5py/pull/2848?dropdown=coverage&src=pr&el=h1&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=h5py) Report
:white_check_mark: All modified and coverable lines are covered by tests.
:white_check_mark: Project coverage is 90.39%. Comparing base ([`2ebb63a`](https://app.codecov.io/gh/h5py/h5py/commit/2ebb63a4de9372c6861288fefbe9931957f3ed01?dropdown=coverage&el=desc&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=h5py)) to head ([`7fb59b7`](https://app.codecov.io/gh/h5py/h5py/commit/7fb59b74856c4e33bd9e4f45a55d8200a67a206e?dropdown=coverage&el=desc&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=h5py)).
:warning: Report is 79 commits behind head on master.

<details><summary>Additional details and impacted files</summary>



```diff
@@           Coverage Diff           @@
##           master    #2848   +/-   ##
=======================================
  Coverage   90.39%   90.39%           
=======================================
  Files          16       16           
  Lines        2509     2509           
=======================================
  Hits         2268     2268           
  Misses        241      241           
```
</details>

[:umbrella: View full report in Codecov by Harness](https://app.codecov.io/gh/h5py/h5py/pull/2848?dropdown=coverage&src=pr&el=continue&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=h5py).   
:loudspeaker: Have feedback on the report? [Share it here](https://about.codecov.io/codecov-pr-comment-feedback/?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=h5py).
<details><summary> :rocket: New features to boost your workflow: </summary>

- :snowflake: [Test Analytics](https://docs.codecov.com/docs/test-analytics): Detect flaky tests, report on failures, and find test suite problems.
</details>

comments.body: Thanks, looks good once the CI passes.
